textPlain: The cure is a simple pill, provided by a company with a long history of corruption, prosecuted for "promotion of drugs for unapproved uses, failure to report safety data and kickbacks to physicians in the United States".A company that operates like that sees opportunity in this US administration.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/GSK_plc

> "The U.S. Food and Drug Administration today initiated the approval of leucovorin calcium tablets for patients with cerebral folate deficiency (CFD) ... Individuals with cerebral folate deficiency have been observed to have developmental delays with autistic features (e.g., challenges with social communication, sensory processing, and repetitive behaviors), seizures, and problems with movement and coordination."The wording, my emphasis added, certainly suggests this is a new med for CFD even though the title mentions Autism symptoms, not CFDSearch for the word autism in the release and tell me if you think this treats what they suggest in the title. It would be every other word if they believed it.
This is absolute corruption of the FDA's mission to accurately label and appropriately market drugs.The evidence is from a study with N=40. Not 40,000. 40.

Like many things where what constitutes base data changes and hence graphs change pretty radically, this can be cleanly explained by diagnostic drift. Here's a detailed breakdown: https://www.cremieux.xyz/p/how-to-end-the-autism-epidemic
I'm surprised they didn't just "partner" with General Mills or some such to turn this into an advertisement for folate fortification in sugary breakfast cereals.
Today was the day America officially jumped the shark.
This pill is an obvious scam.  Legos are the treatment.  Give autistic kids more legos.
Apparently Dr Oz stands to profit from one of those approvals..
If the adults ever return to the room, what exactly should be done by everyone responsible, to make nobody else even dream of doing this?
